title: citrus japonica subf. hindsii
intro: Citrus japonica subf. hindsii, also known as the Finger Lime or Citrus Caviar, is a type of citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family and is native to Australia. This plant is valued for its unique, small, and spherical 'caviar-like' vesicles that contain a high concentration of citric acid, which possesses medicinal properties and offers various health benefits. The medicinal properties of the Finger Lime include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Citrus japonica subf. hindsii include using the vesicles as a garnish or adding them to various dishes, as well as making teas, tinctures, and infused oils from the plant's leaves and stems.
